subtitle: Tax Years 2025 & 2026

clientLocation.title: Clients
clientLocation.noWithholding: No withholding — foreign clients do not withhold tax.

disclaimer: This calculation is indicative and does not constitute tax advice. Consult your accountant for an accurate calculation. Based on L.4172/2013 (ITC) & L.5246/2025.

tooltips.misthotos: Employee (Art. 12 §1 ITC). Income tax on employment income with tax-free allowance.
tooltips.mplokaki: Taxed as employee (Art. 12 §2f ITC). Max 3 employers or 75%+ from one. Tax-free allowance applies.
tooltips.atomiki: Business profit tax (Art. 29 ITC). No tax-free allowance. 55% tax prepayment.
tooltips.taxReduction: Tax reduction Art. 16 ITC. Applies only to freelance invoice. Base: €777 (no children), decreases €20/€1,000 over €12,000 income.
tooltips.prepayment: 55% of tax (27.5% in first year). Applies only to sole proprietorship.
tooltips.withholding: Employer withholds 20% of gross fees (Art. 60 ITC). Offset against final tax.
tooltips.efka: EFKA contributions are deducted from gross revenue before tax calculation.
tooltips.foreignClient: According to POL.1029/2018, foreign employers/clients without permanent establishment in Greece are not obligated to withhold tax. A contract documenting the relationship is required.
tooltips.monthlySavings: The amount to set aside each month to cover your tax obligation (tax + EFKA).
tooltips.changes2026: L.5246/2025: New scale with reduced rates, 6th bracket €40-60K (39%), reductions for children and youth ≤30.

tooltips.efkaCeiling: Maximum monthly EFKA contributions. Contributions are calculated up to this ceiling.
tooltips.article5G: Special regime Art. 5G ITC: 50% reduction in income tax for tax residents who transferred their tax residence to Greece.
tooltips.seniority: Seniority increments based on years of service (10% per 3 years, up to 30%).
tooltips.minimumWage: Minimum legal wage for full-time employment.
tooltips.netToGross: Calculates the gross salary corresponding to the desired net.

salaryBreakdown.settlementTooltip: In payroll, tax is rounded monthly. The small difference (usually < €1) is settled in the annual tax return.

items.title: Reliable
items.description: Calculations based on current laws and official EFKA rates

items.question: How is net salary calculated?
items.answer: Gross − EFKA (13.37%) = Taxable → Scale Art.15 − Reduction Art.16 = Tax → Net. Calculation is done automatically based on the ITC.

items.question: What changes in 2026?
items.answer: New scale (L.5246/2025) with reduced rates, especially for families and youth. New 6th bracket €40-60K at 39%, reductions in first brackets for parents.

items.question: Does it cover foreign clients?
items.answer: Yes. Freelance invoice with foreign clients: no 20% withholding, but same tax (POL.1029/2018). Domestic, foreign and mixed are supported.

items.question: Is the calculation accurate?
items.answer: Based on the ITC and EFKA circulars. Small deviations (±€1-2) due to payroll rounding.

items.question: What is Article 5G?
items.answer: 50% tax exemption for employees who transfer their tax residence to Greece. Applies to employees and freelancers.

items.question: Is my data stored?
items.answer: Calculations happen exclusively on your device — no amount or personal data is sent to a server. We use anonymous visitor statistics without cookies.
